raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I purchased a XXXX  Mens Classic Fit Shirt from XXXX for {$130.00}. However, I received a slim-fit shirt instead of the classic fit advertised. I noticed this error on XX/XX/XXXX, and immediately initiated the return process. I obtained a return authorization from XXXX and mailed the item on XX/XX/XXXX via XXXX, with delivery confirmed on XX/XX/XXXX. 

I promptly responded to XXXX request for documentation ( under Dispute ID XXXX ) by providing proof of the returnincluding the return authorization, USPS tracking information, and photographic evidencedemonstrating that I returned exactly the item I received. Despite this, my Citi account has not been permanently credited with the refund, and the merchant continues to dispute my claim by alleging I returned a different or used item. 

*** Resolution Sought : I respectfully request that Citi finalize my dispute in my favor by permanently crediting my account with the full refund amount of {$130.00}, and that the involved parties investigate the merchants conflicting claims.
